# Sync evidence input

JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind sync`.

- Schema JSON: [evidence.sync.schema.json](../../../../schema/inputs/evidence.sync.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.EvidenceSyncInput`

## Root Shape

EvidenceSyncInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind sync`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `base_ref` | `string` | no | BaseRef is the compared base ref when one is available. |
| `head_ref` | `string` | no | HeadRef is the compared head ref when one is available. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the remote-sync result status. |

## Definitions

## EvidenceSyncInput

EvidenceSyncInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind sync`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `base_ref` | `string` | no | BaseRef is the compared base ref when one is available. |
| `head_ref` | `string` | no | HeadRef is the compared head ref when one is available. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the remote-sync result status. |
